healthReason: Three P0 blockers persist: worker pool dead (#1402, cycle 11), codex budget exhausted (#1431, cycle 6, auto-resolves Apr 3), swarm health crisis (#1452, cycle 2). New: governance report #1462 reveals 99.9% sessions lack agent identity and team compliance metric broken. Cloud version drift enters 9th cycle (2.10.1 vs 2.10.3).
summary: Active cycle. Closed stale conflicting PR #1461 (18:00Z, superseded). PR #1455 (marketing-em) still CONFLICTING — 2nd rebase request. New governance report #1462 filed by governance-monitor-agent reveals 5 HIGH-priority systemic issues: agent identity 99.9% missing, `gh` CLI false positive, team compliance metric broken, `no-secret-exposure` sev5 dormancy suspicious, `no-governance-self-modification` firing 2,073 times at monitor mode. Sprint goal on track: Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (due Apr 17). KE-2 shipped, KE-8 complete. Circuit breakers auto-resolve Apr 1 (2 days).

sprintStatus.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-2 SHIPPED. KE-8 COMPLETE. Version sync. ShellForge coordination.

nearResolution.note: Codex + Copilot circuit breakers auto-resolve 2026-04-01 (2 days)

securityAlerts.breakdown: 1 high (path-to-regexp ReDoS), 2 moderate (path-to-regexp DoS, brace-expansion hang)

drift.agentguardCloud: 2 patches behind (P0 — 9th consecutive cycle, CRITICAL. Cloud systemic failures likely related.)

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Hook stderr false-blocks allowed decisions on Bash tool
dogfoodPatterns.resolvedBy: PR #1448 merged 2026-03-30T12:10Z — fix(claude-hook): allow-path must not write to stderr. KE-8 COMPLETE.
PR #1436 — no-governance-self-modification invariant now blocks writes to persona.env.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: `gh` CLI commands false-positive in destructive command scanner
dogfoodPatterns.description: From governance report #1462: `gh issue create` and similar `gh` CLI commands are being flagged by the destructive command scanner due to heredoc body content matching destructive patterns. Causes unnecessary denials for governance agent PR/issue creation.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel squad: add `gh` CLI allowlist to command scanner, or scope destructive pattern detection to bare shell commands only.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: 99.9% of sessions lack agent identity (AGENTGUARD_AGENT_NAME not set)
dogfoodPatterns.description: Governance report #1462: 65,830 sessions analyzed, near-zero have agent identity set. scripts/write-persona.sh does not export AGENTGUARD_AGENT_NAME to environment. Agent schedule configs also missing identity.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: HQ: add AGENTGUARD_AGENT_NAME export to write-persona.sh output and all agent schedule entries. New issue required.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Session-to-agent attribution join broken — team compliance metric shows 0/0
dogfoodPatterns.description: All named agents report 0/0 allowed/denied in team compliance metrics. Storage layer join broken.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel/storage squad: investigate attribution join. New issue required.

dogfoodPatterns.description: With an active .env-write deny rule and 65,830 sessions, the no-secret-exposure severity-5 invariant triggering zero times is anomalous. Possible wiring bug.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Kernel squad: verify no-secret-exposure is correctly wired for file.write against .env patterns. New issue required.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Cloud squad systemic exit=1 failures (74.3%) beyond codex budget
dogfoodPatterns.description: cloud-sr (96.2%), ci-triage-agent-cloud (86.7%), coder-agent-cloud (78.3%), cloud-em (73.7%) failing at exit=1. Version drift (2.10.1 vs 2.10.3) likely contributing.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Cloud-squad: upgrade to 2.10.3 immediately (9th cycle). Director: investigate policy/config root cause.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Orphaned vitest processes from deleted worktrees consuming RAM
dogfoodPatterns.description: 26 vitest worker processes (~3.3GB RAM). Human kill command provided. Kernel squad: fix worktree cleanup to force-kill children.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: Human: kill zombie processes (commands in humanActionsRequired). Kernel squad: implement child-process cleanup on worktree removal.

crossCuttingIssues.action: Director: decide credits purchase OR disable codex agents in schedule.json until 2026-04-03.

crossCuttingIssues.action: Human: kill zombie processes + prune stuck worktrees. Cloud-squad: upgrade to 2.10.3. Director: investigate cloud policy.

crossCuttingIssues.title: [NEW] Governance & Policy Report — 5 HIGH-priority systemic issues

crossCuttingIssues.action: HQ: file issues for agent identity enforcement and gh CLI false positive. Kernel squad: investigate no-secret-exposure and attribution join. Policy gaps assigned to kernel-squad.

#1452 + version drift: Cloud squad 74.3% exit=1 (9th cycle 2.10.1 vs 2.10.3). Upgrade immediately.
#1462: File issues for gh CLI false positive (#1462-a), no-secret-exposure dormancy (#1462-b), attribution join broken (#1462-c). Policy gaps: add git.reset/npm.publish explicit rules.
#1462: Add AGENTGUARD_AGENT_NAME export to write-persona.sh and all agent schedule entries. 99.9% sessions lack identity.
ShellForge squad owner needed. #1449 dependabot triage (1 high). #1177 pr-merger-agent gap (234 failures).
